metadata.description: Claude Code skills for opinionated Nushell development

plugins.name: nushell-completions
plugins.description: Generate Nushell custom completions — completer functions, string@completer annotations, inline @[...] lists, @complete attribute, extern definitions.

plugins.name: nushell-style
plugins.description: Opinionated Nushell patterns, pipeline composition, command choices, formatting (Topiary), testing (nutest), NUON, debugging (--ide-check), toolkit.nu, and MCP server conventions for .nu files.
